items.name: context-matic
items.description: Coding agents hallucinate APIs. ContextMatic gives them curated, versioned API and SDK docs. Ask your agent to "integrate the payments API" and it guesses — falling back on outdated training data and generic patterns that don't match your actual SDK. ContextMatic solves this by giving the agent deterministic, version-aware, SDK-native context at the exact moment it's needed.
items.searchText: context-matic coding agents hallucinate apis. contextmatic gives them curated, versioned api and sdk docs. ask your agent to "integrate the payments api" and it guesses — falling back on outdated training data and generic patterns that don't match your actual sdk. contextmatic solves this by giving the agent deterministic, version-aware, sdk-native context at the exact moment it's needed. api-context api-integration mcp sdk apimatic third-party-apis sdks
